        ≤ (a * a + b * b + c * c + d * d) := by
          apply Real.geom_mean_le_arith_mean4_weighted <;> linarith
        _ ≤ 1 := by nlinarith [sq_nonneg (a - b), sq_nonneg (b - c), sq_nonneg (c - d), sq_nonneg a, sq_nonneg b, sq_nonneg c, sq_nonneg d]
  nlinarith [Real.geom_mean_le_arith_mean4_weighted ha0.le hb0.le hc0.le hd0.le h1]
